title: bus.bead.created v1
description: A new bead was filed in a project's .beads/ tracker. Emitted by bd hooks on 'bd create'. Note: the CloudEvent type field is 'bus.bead.created' (no .v1 suffix), so redis-mirror currently passes these through without schema validation; consumers reading nbus:bus.bead.created should tolerate forward-compatible additions. The bus.bead.lifecycle.v1 stream carries hearth-loom's own lifecycle events (container_died, etc.) and is a separate, unrelated stream.

bead_id.description: Cross-project bead id (e.g. tengine-9k2x, loom-78wk, nervous-bus-bafq, nervous-bus-71cn.8)

project.description: Which project's .beads/ this bead lives in (e.g. nervous-bus, tengine, hearth-loom, bus-redis-delivery). Not enum-constrained — new projects must not require a schema bump.

description_excerpt.description: First 1000 chars of the bead description (full text via bd show)

depends_on.description: Other bead_ids this one blocks on

has_acceptance_criteria.description: True if the bead has machine-readable acceptance — required for hearth-loom to claim
